feed.title: Draw Things / @drawthingsapp
feed.description: Twitter feed for: @drawthingsapp. Generated by https://nitter.net

items.title:
Pinned: 📹 It's FINALLY HERE！

🔄 Draw Things v1.20260228.0 was released in iOS / macOS AppStore Just Now. This version brings:

🔹LTX-2 model that supports video generation with audio;
🔹Fix FLUX.2 issue related to loading LoRAs without merging.
🔹Fix FLUX.2 crash with Tiled Diffusion.
🔹Support High-Quality Preview for Wan 2.x models, SD v1.5, SDXL and SD3 models.
🔹Disable High-Quality Preview for Intel Macs.

gRPCServerCLI was updated to 1.20260303.0 with the same features.

👊 Looking forward to seeing your exploration and discoveries with LTX-2 in DT.
items.description:
📹 It's FINALLY HERE！

🔄 Draw Things v1.20260228.0 was released in iOS / macOS AppStore Just Now. This version brings:

🔹LTX-2 model that supports video generation with audio;
🔹Fix FLUX.2 issue related to loading LoRAs without merging.
🔹Fix FLUX.2 crash with Tiled Diffusion.
🔹Support High-Quality Preview for Wan 2.x models, SD v1.5, SDXL and SD3 models.
🔹Disable High-Quality Preview for Intel Macs.

gRPCServerCLI was updated to 1.20260303.0 with the same features.

👊 Looking forward to seeing your exploration and discoveries with LTX-2 in DT.

items.title: Go preorder your M5 Max now. We have something special for you beyond what Apple announced here. ⚡️

items.title:
R to @drawthingsapp: ✨ While LoRAs aren't always a must, The Quality Slider LoRA (0.5 - BETA) gives you much finer control over your results.

📸 Check out these comparisons: the same prompt with different LoRA weights. I believe these results will speak for themselves and spark some new ideas for your workflow!

🔗 LoRA Link: https://civitai.com/models/2329296?modelVersionId=2620218
